remarks.para: Supported Transmission Speed Range: Both MCP2221 and MCP2221A officially support Standard Mode (100 kbps) and Fast Mode (400 kbps).

item.description: MCP2221A: Minimum recommended speed is approx. 47 kbps. The speed divider is calculated as Divider = (12 MHz / Speed) - 2.
MCP2221: Minimum recommended speed is approx. 12 kbps. The speed divider is calculated as Divider = ((12 MHz / Speed) - 20) / 4.

remarks.para: High-Speed Mode (3.4 Mbps): Not supported. Although the divider formula might allow for higher values, the physical electrical characteristics (rise/fall times) and internal logic are not designed for High-Speed mode. Values exceeding 400 kbps are generally not recommended for reliable communication.
